title: Checkbox Component
content: Checkbox provides a visual representation of a binary choice, allowing users to choose between multiple options or toggle a single option on or off. Each Checkbox operates independently, meaning a user can toggle each option on or off without affecting the state of others. Checkboxes are essential for creating interactive forms, surveys, or any scenario that requires users to make multiple selections from a list. By facilitating multi-selection, the Checkbox component enhances usability and provides a straightforward, intuitive means of user input. in Design Systems Adobe Spectrum Alaska Airlines Auro Amazon Cloudscape Atlassian Design System Audi Basis Biings Carrefour Marcel CBRE Build Blocks Cisco Momentum Design Datadog Druids Dell Docplanner Watson eBay Evo Elastic Esri Calcite General Electric Edison Github Primer GitLab Pajamas Google Material Design GOV.UK Gusto Workbench Helly Hansen IBM Carbon Ideagen Helix INPS Sirio Kajabi Sage Kiwicom Orbit Lemon Squeezy Wedges Line LocalTapiola Duet Michelin Motion Microsoft Fluent 2 Monday.com Vibe MongoDB LeafyGreen Motorway Highway Code Mozilla Protocol Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Blueprint Pinterest Gestalt Pluralsight Porsche Razorpay Blade Red Hat PatternFly Rei Cedar Salesforce Lightning Seek Braid Segment Evergreen ServiceNow Horizon Shopify Polaris Skoda Flow Sprout Social Seeds SumUp Circuit Sunrise Solar Thumbtack Thumbprint Twilio Paste U.S. Web UAE Uber Base Vercel Geist Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Codex Wise Wonderflow Wanda Workday Canvas WorkOS Radix Zendesk Garden
